summary: The rate of drugs or medication recovered from youth in detention rose through Fiscal 2024 before falling sharply. ACS's own report credits the recent decline to enhanced search and investigation procedures, more frequent searches, and — starting in Fiscal 2026 — new millimeter-wave body scanners installed to detect contraband.

sources.label: ACS, Fiscal 2026 Preliminary Mayor's Management Report

oneLiner: increasing overall, though recent searches and new scanners have cut it sharply
